TermsPage.title: Terms and Conditions
TermsPage.intro: Please read these Terms and Conditions carefully before using Media 2 Go. By using this application, you agree to be bound by these terms. If you do not agree, please discontinue use.
TermsPage.s1Body: Media 2 Go is a personal-use tool that enables you to download publicly available videos from supported platforms for your own private consumption. It is not intended for commercial redistribution, mass scraping, or any use that violates applicable laws or third-party rights.
TermsPage.s2Body: You are solely responsible for ensuring that your use of this application complies with all applicable laws, regulations, and the terms of service of the platforms from which you download content. We do not monitor, control, or take responsibility for the content you download.
TermsPage.s3Body: Downloading a video does not transfer any copyright or ownership rights to you. You must respect the intellectual property rights of content creators and rights holders. Redistribution, public performance, or commercial use of downloaded content without proper authorization may constitute copyright infringement under applicable law.
TermsPage.s4Body: Most platforms - including YouTube, Facebook, Instagram, TikTok, and X (Twitter) - prohibit scraping or automated downloading in their Terms of Service. Violating a platform's ToS is a civil matter between you and that platform, not a criminal act in most jurisdictions. However, you use this application at your own risk and assume full responsibility for any ToS violations.
TermsPage.s5Body: This application uses yt-dlp, an open-source tool published under the Unlicense. yt-dlp is legal software. Courts in multiple jurisdictions have held that Terms of Service violations alone do not constitute illegal activity. Whether a specific download is lawful in your jurisdiction depends on local copyright law and the nature of the content.
TermsPage.s6Body: This application only downloads content from publicly accessible streams. It does not circumvent Digital Rights Management (DRM) or technical protection measures. Circumventing DRM may violate laws such as the DMCA § 1201 (United States), the EU Copyright Directive, or equivalent legislation in your country, and is not supported by this application.
TermsPage.s7Body: We do not collect, store, or share any user information in any form. This application uses no cookies for identification, no analytics services, no tracking pixels, and no third-party data collection of any kind. No personal data, usage data, or behavioral data is gathered at any point. When you submit a URL, it is used solely to initiate the requested download and is not retained. We have no way of identifying who you are or how you use this application.
TermsPage.s8Body: This application relies on third-party open-source tools including yt-dlp (Unlicense) and FFmpeg (LGPL/GPL). These tools are provided under their respective open-source licenses. We are not affiliated with, endorsed by, or responsible for these projects or their developers. Their availability and behavior may change at any time.
TermsPage.s9Body: This application is provided on a best-effort basis. Platform changes, network issues, or yt-dlp extractor updates may cause downloads to fail at any time without notice. We make no guarantees of availability, uptime, or compatibility with any specific URL or platform.
TermsPage.s10Body: This application is provided "as is" without warranty of any kind, express or implied, including but not limited to warranties of merchantability, fitness for a particular purpose, or non-infringement. Your use of this application is entirely at your own risk.
TermsPage.s11Body: To the fullest extent permitted by applicable law, we shall not be liable for any direct, indirect, incidental, special, or consequential damages arising from your use of this application, including but not limited to copyright claims, platform account suspensions, data loss, or any other harm resulting from downloaded content.
TermsPage.s12Body: We reserve the right to update these Terms and Conditions at any time without prior notice. Continued use of the application after changes are posted constitutes your acceptance of the revised terms. The date at the top of this page reflects the most recent revision.
TermsPage.s13Body: All downloaded and processed media files are stored exclusively on your device using the Origin Private File System (OPFS), a browser-native sandboxed storage layer. No files are uploaded to or retained on our servers at any point. You are solely responsible for managing, organizing, backing up, or deleting all media stored in your browser. Clearing your browser's site data or storage permissions will permanently delete these files with no possibility of recovery. We bear no responsibility for any data loss resulting from your storage management actions, browser updates, or device changes.

VideoGrid.title: Downloads
VideoGrid.confirmDeleteText: This will remove the video from your downloads. This action cannot be undone.
VideoGrid.confirmConvertText: This will re-encode the video from H.265 to H.264 in your browser. The process may take a while depending on the video length and your device performance.
VideoGrid.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
VideoGrid.noResults: No videos match the current filters
VideoGrid.errorFfmpegFailed: FPS interpolation failed. Downloading original instead.
VideoGrid.errorBurnCaptionsFailed: Failed to burn captions into video.
VideoGrid.burnCaptionsText: Subtitles will be permanently embedded into the video. Choose a position and style below.
VideoGrid.burnCaptionsTranslateNoCredits: No credits available. Translation requires credits.
VideoGrid.burnCaptionsGroqKeyHint: Subtitle translation requires a Groq account and API key. Get yours at
VideoGrid.burnCaptionsBorderStyleBoxHint: A solid filled rectangle is drawn behind the text. Maximum readability on any background.
VideoGrid.burnCaptionsBorderStyleOutlineHint: Each character is surrounded by a colored border. Keeps the text clean without blocking the picture.
VideoGrid.errorStorageQuota: Not enough device storage. The video could not be saved to your device.
VideoGrid.errorOpfsUploadFailed: Failed to upload video to server.
VideoGrid.fpsDeviceOnlyText: On-device FPS interpolation is not available for FHD and higher resolutions. Enable 'Use server' to process this video.
VideoGrid.scaleDownText: Select a lower resolution. The video will be re-encoded to the chosen size.
VideoGrid.convertH265ServerOnly: H.265 conversion requires server processing. Enable 'Use server' to proceed.
VideoGrid.serverOffConfirmText: Processing on this device uses FFmpeg in the browser, which is significantly slower than server processing for large or high-resolution videos.
VideoGrid.diarizeModalText: Choose how many words appear on each subtitle row. Fewer words keep each line short and easy to read; more words fit longer phrases per line.

Offline.title: You are offline
Offline.body: Your saved videos are still available. Connect to the internet to download new videos.

MigrationBanner.heading: We're moving to Media 2 Go!
MigrationBanner.body: After May 31 ({days} days left), vd2.iguzman.com.mx will become read-only - no new downloads will be available there. Head over to our new home to keep downloading.

Credits.purchaseText: Select a credit pack. Credits are used for subtitle translation, comment downloads, and server processing. Your key can be shared with anyone - credits are shared across all uses. Use it on as many devices as you like.
Credits.purchaseNote: Your key is saved in your browser. Save it somewhere safe in case you switch devices.
Credits.purchaseError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
Credits.restoreText: Enter your credits key to restore your balance on this device.
Credits.restoreInvalidKey: Key not found. Please check and try again.
Credits.restoreError: Could not verify the key. Please try again.
Credits.deleteKeyText: This will permanently remove your credits key from this device. We do not store a copy - this action cannot be undone.
Credits.couponSuccessText: {credits} credits have been added to your account.
Credits.couponErrorText: This coupon is invalid, expired, or has already been used.
Credits.couponGenericError: Something went wrong. Please try again.

offline.title: Watch Anywhere, Even Offline
offline.body1: Download your favorite videos and take them with you on planes, trains, or anywhere with no internet connection.
offline.body2: Once saved to your device, content plays anytime - no Wi-Fi required.

reelMode.title: Your Reels, All in One Place
reelMode.body1: Collect your favorite short videos from TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, and more into a single personal library.
reelMode.body2: Discover, save, and replay what matters to you - no algorithm needed.

subtitles.title: Subtitles & Translations
subtitles.body1: Download captions alongside your videos and burn them directly into the footage.
subtitles.body2: Need another language? Translate subtitles automatically and get perfectly timed text in any locale.

musicPlayer.title: Built-in Music Player
musicPlayer.body1: Download the audio track from any video and enjoy it in the integrated music player.
musicPlayer.body2: Browse your audio library, create playlists, and listen in the background while you multitask.

videoEditor.title: Powerful Video Editor
videoEditor.body1: Transform your downloads right in the browser: resize video, boost frame rate, convert to H.265, and remove black bars.
videoEditor.body2: No extra software or account needed - everything runs on your device.

FeatureSlider.dontShowAgainText: The feature banner will no longer be shown.

MusicPlayer.emptyAudioOnly: No audio tracks saved to your device yet. Download some audio first, or turn on "Include videos" to also play video files.
MusicPlayer.emptyWithVideos: No media files saved to your device yet. Download something first.
